title: Luscious Winey Ukrainian Rice Noodle Bowl
description: A light, pillowy bowl of brown rice noodles tossed in a wine-infused mushroom sauce and topped with sous‑vide chicken, perfect for a low‑glycemic Ukrainian dinner.
instructions: Preheat the sous‑vide water bath to 65°C.
Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Place the chicken in a vacuum‑sealed bag with 20 ml of wine and sous‑vide for 90 minutes.
While the chicken cooks, bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to package instructions for 8 minutes, then drain.
In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat and sauté minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until softened.
Pour in the remaining wine, reduce by half, and stir in the low‑sodium broth.
Toss the cooked noodles into the skillet, coating them with the sauce.
Remove the chicken from the bag, slice, and fold it into the noodle bowl.
Garnish with fresh dill and parsley before serving.
